text.title: Human-in-the-Loop Design Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for human-in-the-loop-design.

decision-tree.root-question: Are AI decisions high-stakes-and-irreversible enough to warrant HITL?

conclusion.verdict: SKIP — HITL is overhead at this stakes level
DESIGN ESCALATION PATH — full HITL is wrong shape
REDESIGN UI — reduce reviewer cognitive load
BLOCK — feedback loop is part of HITL definition
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: preconditions met → first branch matches → conclusion ref resolves to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.
